case_title: DEMONFORT CARTER VS. LISA ELAN SHIELDS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF DEMONFORT CARTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S LISA SHIELDS AND CHRISTIAN SHIELDS ARE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR BOTH DEFENDANT'S. DEFENDANT LISA SHIELDS WAIVES HER RIGHT TO SERVICE. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN SHIELDS WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER, DEMONFORT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIELDS, LISA ELAN SHIELDS, CHRISTIAN DEANDRE $901.88 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $976.88, PLUS $241 PAYABLE DIRECTLY TO KAISER OR ITS AGENT FOR THE MEDICAL LIEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CARTER, DEMONFORT AS TO DEFENDANT SHIELDS, LISA ELAN SHIELDS, CHRISTIAN DEANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CARTER, DEMONFORT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CARTER, DEMONFORT SHIELDS, LISA ELAN SHIELDS, CHRISTIAN DEANDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO LISA ELAN SHIELDS ON 04/17/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURN MAIL / NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT/ SENT TO DEFENDANT / UNABLE TO FORWARD.
